text: The system shall allow users to add items to a shopping cart.
The system shall display the total price including taxes before checkout.
Users shall be able to add products to their shopping cart.
The checkout page shall load within 2 seconds.
The checkout page shall load within 5 seconds.
Users shall be able to apply discount coupons at checkout.
The system shall not allow guest users to apply discount coupons.
The system shall send an order confirmation email after purchase.
The checkout shall display the total price with taxes included.
The system shall accept Visa and Mastercard payments.
The platform shall use HTTPS for all customer-facing pages.
The system shall maintain a record of all transactions for 7 years.
